notes:
The game runs perfectely right out of the box, but the video quality are the default options, and so they look quite bad. Also, graphics settings cannot be changed inside the game, so you have to use the Configure option on the confirmation box that shows after pressing Start. The Configuration program doesn't run, it crashes right away, so, to get it running, execute the following command on the Terminal (after installing Winetricks) (change UserName to your name), and it'll run just as it should:
WINEPREFIX="/home/UserName/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/212480/pfx/" winetricks dotnet46
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: Works out of the box. Only had to manually setup the resolution and other graphical options by creating the "settings.xml" file as others suggest.
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: This works perfectly out of the box using a wireless xbox360 controller. The only thing I can't see to find is any video settings to change the resolution but this is possibly a short coming of the game rather than anything proton related.
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: Game runs excellent out of the box without problems.  Configure tool does not launch, need to edit manually.  A pain if you want to remap controller buttons, (such as accelerate).  Only need to do that once.
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: The game works out of the box with great performance. The configuration tool however does not, but it can be fixed using protontricks by installing dotnet40.
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: Need to import config from elsewhere as the setup launcher doesn't work. Otherwise the game runs nicely
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: Had to manually import configuration file: settings.xml, otherwise performance was just like windows. 10/10
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: With the latest proton 4.2-3 the launcher menu now works perfectly. There's no need to import xml files. Everything is silk smooth. I just recomend to disable vsync in graphics options.
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: Connect all controllers before starting the game.
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: The Launcher doesn't work for me even with Proton 4.2-3, but the base game does. This, however, does mean that the configuration in steamapps/compatdata/212480/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/SART/My Documents" is not generated. The game runs perfectly fine but with very low graphical fidelity. If you install dotnet40 with protontricks then the launcher runs. Highly recommend disabling vsync, which is a given for games in general (even outside of Linux). With everything else at max, the game runs perfect.
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: The game runs, but the Configuration menu does not load. I am able to play it at High settings with no frame drops.
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: The configurator does not work but can be made to work by installing the dotnet46 winetricks like so :WINEPREFIX="${HOME}/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/212480/pfx/" winetricks dotnet46
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: Install dotnet40 to get the launcher to work (necessary to change controllers and graphics settings)
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: Configurator not working, default settings result in sub 60 FPS and wrong resolution.
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: Steering would intermittently become unresponsive. Found that to be a problem caused by xpad-neo driver. Reverting to kernel xpad driver, game works great
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: Runs fine out of the box.
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: The game now works with d9vk with excelent frame hates, graohics, sound and controls. The only issue still with the game launcher, that still needs dotnet to load properly. Winemono sometimes work sometimes it don't.
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection

notes: The configuration menu doesn't function at all, but the game runs without any major issues. I've experienced two frame-drops in more than an hour of play, but the framerate is otherwise stable.
title: Sonic & All-Stars Racing Transformed Collection
